title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Look at the question and the ideas around it. Discuss each idea with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.centralQuestion: What encourages children to take up and stay in sport?
content.decisionTask: Now decide which two factors are the most important for encouraging children to stay in sport.

script.text: I'd like you to look at this question and these ideas, and talk together about what encourages children to take up sport.
Now you have about a minute to decide which two factors are the most important.
